message:
fix(ci): fix workflow_dispatch boolean default

- Use boolean false instead of string for checksums workflow input

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -28,7 +28,7 @@ name: Generate ACIP Checksums
       force_regenerate:
         description: 'Force regeneration even if files unchanged'
         required: false
-        default: 'false'
+        default: false
         type: boolean
 
 permissions:
